user.title: Create an aggregate Stremio library
user.description: Configure the PC server and providers. Latin Audio and Sports are preloaded; a temporary optional-provider outage will not block the integration.

data_description.catalog_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Cinemeta is preloaded.
data_description.stream_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Torrentio is preloaded.
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: OpenSubtitles v3 is preloaded; leave empty to disable.
data_description.latin_manifest_urls: Preloaded to prioritize Spanish/Latin audio. This profile plays without subtitles.
data_description.sports_manifest_urls: StremVerse is preloaded for F1 and sports. Its outages do not block movies and series.
data_description.default_media_player: Chromecast, Android TV or another media_player entity

data.play_ideal_on_select: Play ideal link when selecting an item

data_description.stream_manifest_urls: Default providers for movies and series.
data_description.latin_manifest_urls: Preloaded with a Spanish/Latin provider. Used only by Latin Audio and plays without subtitles.
data_description.sports_manifest_urls: StremVerse is preloaded for F1/sports. A temporary failure does not block the rest of the integration.
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.play_ideal_on_select: Enabled by default. Movies, episodes and events play directly without opening the source list.
data_description.ideal_link_filter: Prefers 1080p, most seeders and, on ties, the smallest file.
data_description.audio_mode: Automatic wraps problematic torrents as H.264/AAC HLS. Direct performs no conversion. Force always transcodes.
data_description.exclude_keywords: Comma separated, for example CAM, TS, HDCAM.
data_description.subtitle_mode: Automatic loads the first preferred language on Google Cast.
data_description.subtitle_languages: ISO codes in priority order, for example spa, eng.
data_description.subtitle_convert_vtt: Downloads, converts and serves WebVTT from Home Assistant.
data_description.subtitle_base_url: Recommended LAN URL reachable by Chromecast: {recommended_subtitle_base_url}

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the main stream-server. Check its IP address and port 11470.
error.invalid_config: The core configuration is invalid. Check the catalog and default stream URLs.
